# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.

Prevent service mesh security.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  proxyAdminPort: 15000
  envoyFilters:
    - kind: EnvoyFilter
      metadata:
        name: enable-admin-endpoints
      spec:
        workloadSelector:
          labels:
            app: your-app-label
        configPatches:
          - applyTo: LISTENER
            match:
              context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
              listener:
                filterChain:
                  filters:
                    - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
                      subFilter:
                        name: envoy.filters.http.router
            patch:
              operation: INSERT_BEFORE
              value:
                name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
                subFilter:
                  name: envoy.filters.http.router
                typedConfig:
                  "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
                  stat_prefix: ingress_http
                  route_config:
                    name: local_route
                    virtual_hosts:
                      - name: local_service
                        domains:
                          - "*"
                        routes:
                          - match:
                              prefix: "/"
                            route:
                              cluster: service_cluster
                  http_filters:
                    - name: envoy.filters.http.router
        - applyTo: LISTENER
          match:
            context: SIDECAR_OUTBOUND
            listener:
              filterChain:
                filters:
                  - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
                    subFilter:
                      name: envoy.filters.http.router
          patch:
            operation: INSERT_BEFORE
            value:
              name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
              subFilter:
                name: envoy.filters.http.router
              typedConfig:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
                stat_prefix: egress_http
                route_config:
                  name: local_route
                  virtual_hosts:
                    - name: local_service
                      domains:
                        - "*"
                      routes:
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/"
                          route:
                            cluster: outbound_cluster
                http_filters:
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.router
